segments.text: Hello, thank you for calling customer support. My name is Alex and I will help you today.
I'm calling about an order that arrived damaged. The package was delivered yesterday, but the screen is cracked.
I would like a refund or replacement as soon as possible.
You can reach me at john.smith.

full_text: Hello, thank you for calling customer support. My name is Alex and I will help you today. I'm calling about an order that arrived damaged. The package was delivered yesterday, but the screen is cracked. I would like a refund or replacement as soon as possible. The order number is AX19735. You can reach me at john.smith. That's... Example.com. Also my phone number is 5550199. Thank you.
